title: Familiars: Minecraft Pack
description: An Addon pack for the Familiars: Re-Imagined! API
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b82a6dc173e03ea91808f9fdb4e616c226816b.png)

                        | Media Coming Soon | Planned Versions: Forge 1.19.x 1.20.x Neoforge 1.21+ | 

                                            Latest Version: Forge 1.18.2 - 0.2.5a

                    | REQUIRES Geckolib | REQUIRES Familiars: Reimagined API | No Fabric Port Planned |
This is a Remake/Reimagining of the old Familiars Mod from 1.7.10. One of my old favorite mods that was never updated and lost to time. It doesnt even directly exist on the internet. 
Original Familiars Mod Video
✨ The Standard Collection of Minecraft Companions

Minecraft Familiars Pack brings 77+ unique magical companions from the vanilla Minecraft world to life! From humble chickens to the mighty Ender Dragon, this pack transforms familiar creatures into powerful allies with unique abilities and personalities. Version specific! No Warden in 1.18.2, etc. 

🔍 Familiar Features
🔮 Unique Unlock Mechanics 

Each familiar has a specially designed quest reflecting its nature and personality. Complete challenges ranging from breeding animals to facing fears to exploring dangerous terrain. 
⚔️ Varied Abilities

    Mobility: Teleportation, flight, speed boosts, and water breathing
    Combat: Damage buffs, summons, projectiles, and area attacks
    Utility: Light generation, crop growth, item magnetism, and more
    Protection: Damage reduction, healing, and enemy repulsion

💫 Visual Spectacle

Every familiar has custom particles, sound effects, or animations that bring their helpful nature to light.

🔧 Installation

    Install Minecraft Forge for 1.18.2
    Download and place GeckoLib JAR file in your mods folder
    Place the Familiars: Reimagined API JAR file in your mods folder
    Place the Minecraft Familiars Pack JAR file in your mods folder

 

 
🧩 Compatibility

    Familiars: Reimagined API: Required base mod
    Minecraft: 1.18.2+
    Forge: 40.2.0+
    GeckoLib: 3.0.57+

🤝 Community & Support

    Discord Server: [Link] Join our community for help and showcasing your creations
    Wiki: [Link] Comprehensive documentation and tutorials
    GitHub: [Link] Report issues and contribute to development
    CurseForge: [Link] Download the latest versions and addons

👑 Credits & Permissions

    Feel free to include this mod in modpacks
    Please provide credit when using this API in your projects
    Submit your custom familiar packs to our community showcase!

 
CurseForge - a world of endless gaming possibilities for modders and gamers alike.
